instalaciones.surgery_rooms_p1: The surgical centers where Dr. Perez performs his surgeries are specialized in the area of plastic surgery, thus counting on state-of-the-art technology and a multidisciplinary group of anesthesiologists and nurses who provide all the safety and confidence required by his patients.

instalaciones.surgery_rooms_p3: We strive to offer our patients an environment of comfort and personalized treatment that makes the difference.

guias.title: Pre and Post Operative Guides
guias.description: Educational resources for your surgical process
guias.intro_p1: For Dr. Pérez, helping you look as young and beautiful as you feel inside is more than a purpose: it is our greatest commitment. Very soon you will begin a transformative experience, and we feel deeply honored to accompany you on this path towards a better version of yourself.
guias.intro_p2: As a plastic surgeon, it is a privilege to have been chosen to carry out this procedure that you have desired with such enthusiasm. My commitment —and that of my entire team— is total: we will work with professionalism, precision, and dedication to achieve harmonious and natural results. We want you to know that we are here for you at all times... but that no one else knows. During every stage of your treatment, you can count on our accompaniment and personalized advice. We are here for you.
guias.general_considerations_p1: Good preparation is key to achieving excellent results and ensuring optimal recovery. Therefore, it is fundamental that you know what to do before surgery and what to expect afterwards. This will allow you to face each phase of the process with peace of mind and confidence.
guias.general_considerations_p2: It is important to understand that every body reacts differently. Inflammation, scarring, and the pace of recovery vary between patients, so we recommend that you do not compare your process with that of others. Patience and following medical instructions will be your best allies.
guias.general_considerations_p3: With more than 30 years of experience and thousands of procedures performed, I can assure you that the vast majority of our patients experience a calm recovery without complications. This is because we use minimally invasive surgical techniques, highly predictable and supported by state-of-the-art technology.
guias.phase_early_desc: This stage comprises the first days after surgery. During the first 48 to 72 hours, it is normal to present greater inflammation. However, from the third day onwards, a rapid improvement usually begins. By the second week, many patients feel ready to return to their daily and work activities, although the recovery process is still underway. Among the most common signs that may indicate that a person is a candidate for this procedure are:
guias.phase_late_title: 2. Late Phase (up to 6 months or more):
guias.phase_late_desc_1: In this phase, the body continues to heal internally. Scars progressively soften and final results begin to consolidate. It is in this period when the appearance reaches its maximum naturalness.
guias.phase_late_desc_2: To help you visualize this process, we have created a video we call "The Rollercoaster of Recovery", where we explain clearly and legally how the body evolves day by day after surgery.
guias.with_you_title: We Are With You Every Step of the Way
guias.with_you_p1: Remember: plastic surgery is a transformative and positive experience, provided it is accompanied by realistic expectations, adequate care, and a medical team committed to your well-being.
guias.with_you_p2: We are proud to accompany you in this important process. Thank you for your trust.
guias.preop_instructions_p1: Prior to any type of surgical procedure, a series of instructions must be taken into account that will be fundamental both for the success of the surgery and the prevention of possible complications. For this reason, we advise our patients to carefully follow each of the instructions that you can find below in the video:
guias.what_to_expect_title: What Can Be Expected After Surgery?
guias.what_to_expect_p1: It is fundamental that you understand that, after a surgical procedure, certain side symptoms may occur. Most of these manifestations are normal, transient, and vary according to each patient. Although serious complications are rare, it is key to be in constant communication with us to resolve any doubts you may have about your evolution.
guias.what_to_expect_p2: Below, we explain the most common and expected reactions in the postoperative period:
guias.reminder_text: Remember: Given any symptom that concerns you or if you notice unexpected changes, do not hesitate to communicate with our team. We are here to accompany you at every stage of your recovery.
guias.postop_care_title: The Key to Success: Good Postoperative Care
guias.postop_care_p1: The success of a surgery does not depend solely on the procedure itself, but also on the patient's commitment to their recovery process. Properly following medical instructions and maintaining a responsible commitment to our team's indications is fundamental to obtaining the best results and living a satisfactory experience.
guias.postop_care_p2: Therefore, we have prepared a series of educational videos covering the postoperative care of the surgical procedures we perform most frequently. These materials have been carefully designed so that you have access at any time and so that it is easy and accessible for you to follow each of the instructions that help you recover in the best way.
guias.postop_care_rec_1: We recommend watching these videos before your procedure.
guias.postop_care_rec_2: They will help you understand each stage of recovery better and allow you to face the process with greater peace of mind and confidence.
guias.maintenance_p1: As with many important aspects of our lives, the results of cosmetic surgery also need maintenance. It is vital to protect the aesthetic improvements achieved over time.
guias.maintenance_p2: A surgical procedure can help you rejuvenate your appearance or improve certain areas of your body or face. However, it is important to understand that the passage of time continues and that certain habits and non-surgical treatments can contribute significantly to maintaining those permanent results. What can be done is to care for and enhance those results to keep them in their best version over time.
guias.maintenance_p3: Below, we share some recommendations to preserve the effects of your surgery, both in facial and body procedures:

inflammation.title: Inflammation and "Bruising"
inflammation.description: It is common for them to appear in the days following surgery. Their intensity may vary depending on the type of procedure performed. Bruises will change color during their resolution process, going through green and yellow tones before completely disappearing.

pain.title: Mild to Moderate Pain
pain.description: Depending on the type of surgery and individual sensitivity, it is possible to feel discomfort or mild pain. This is usually controllable with the indicated medications. If the pain increases progressively or becomes intense, it is important to contact the medical team immediately.

bleeding.title: Mild Bleeding
bleeding.description: Scarce bleeding through incisions or surgical drains can be considered normal in the first days. However, if the bleeding is significant or persistent, the medical team must be informed immediately.

numbness.title: Numbness or Loss of Sensitivity
numbness.description: It is common to feel numbness in the areas near the incisions. This sensation may be temporary and improve gradually, respecting the time the body needs in weeks or months.

nausea.title: Nausea or Vomiting
nausea.description: They may occur as a side effect of anesthesia or some medications used during surgery. If you have a history of sensitivity to these drugs, please communicate it before the procedure to take the necessary preventive measures.

redness.title: Redness or Itching in Wounds
redness.description: During the healing process, wounds may change color (from pink to reddish) and generate some itching. After proper care, they usually improve quickly. If redness is excessive, there is discharge with a bad odor, or fever occurs, it should be indicated to an account immediately for prolonged use, as appropriate.

skincare.title: Daily Skin Care
items: Establishment of a medical-quality routine such as ascorbic acid, Vitamin C, especially, broad-spectrum sunscreen. Its results help maintain healthy, firm, and luminous skin for longer.

Complementary cosmetic treatments: The application of procedures that allow natural collagen protection in the skin: Hifu, Platelet-Rich Plasma, Biostimulators, Microneedling with plasma containing platelets, and other maintenance treatments.

lipofilling.title: Facial Lipofilling with Stem Cells
items: According to Dr. Pérez's experience, this procedure every 2 to 3 years helps maintain skin quality and facial volume. It is an excellent strategy to prevent premature aging and preserve results naturally.

botox.title: Application of Botulinum Toxin (Botox)
items: Performing this reapplication approximately every year helps prevent the appearance of fine facial expression lines, maintaining a young and rested appearance.

nutrition.title: Balanced and Personalized Nutrition
items: A nutritional plan that includes nutritious foods that contribute not only to maintaining aesthetic results but also to general well-being.

exercise.title: Regular Physical Activity
items: exercising 3 to 4 times a week favors muscle tone, improves circulation, and strengthens your general well-being, helping to successfully maintain the results of procedures like liposuction or abdominal surgery.

2.title: It will be a pleasure to assist you
2.subtitle: Your first appointment
2.sub1_text: For all those patients who can attend the appointment directly at Dr. Pérez's office.
2.sub2_text1: For all those patients who live outside Bogotá, whether in Colombia or abroad. It is carried out via the internet thanks to the fact that we have modern online platforms for carrying out these virtual appointments with the necessary security and privacy.
2.sub2_text2: For the realization of the virtual appointment, Dr. Pérez requests in advance the sending of photos and in some cases video of the areas of your body that you wish to improve; this is for the purpose of being able to carry out an adequate assessment of each particular case.

3.title: We accompany you every step of your process
3.subtitle: Your assistant
3.p1: With the purpose of providing you with all the guidance and advice during the process before and after your surgery, one of our assistants will be ready to provide you with all the information concerning:
list: What are the requirements prior to surgery
Scheduling the date and time of both the surgery and the pre-anesthesia appointment.
3.p2: For those patients coming from abroad, we have a bilingual coordinator who will contact you directly in order to advise you on all details regarding travel dates, accommodation options, and transport among many others.

4.title: Your safety is our priority
4.subtitle: Passport for your surgery
4.p1: For Dr. Pérez and his entire work team, your safety and well-being is one of our highest priorities, for this reason we have created this passport which once you have completed will allow you to arrive completely prepared and safely to your surgery. You do not have to worry because every detail of your preparation will be supervised, and if you have doubts or concerns we will be ready to resolve them.
4.p2: This surgery passport includes the approval of each of the following requirements:
list: Laboratories and other paraclinical exams ordered by Dr. Pérez.
Preanesthesia appointment, which takes place at the clinic personally with one of the anesthesiologists and takes place one to two days prior to the procedure.
Approval and signature by the patient of the informed consents for each of the procedures to be performed.

5.title: The day you longed for has arrived, we will make it very special
5.subtitle: Your surgery
5.p1: When this long-awaited day arrives, everything will be prepared by Dr. Pérez's team, in order to provide you with the best possible experience.
5.p2: Prior to the start of surgery, Dr. Pérez carries out several important steps:
list1: Preoperative photos are taken, according to the procedures to be performed.

Dr. Pérez carries out the demarcation of the incisions that will be necessary and other relevant details for the proper improved realization of the surgery. This aims to capture and make clear the preoperative planning of each of the procedures.
5.p3: Once the surgery is finished:
list2: The patient will remain in the recovery area, as long as necessary, under the permanent supervision and monitoring of the medical and nursing staff in charge.
Once it is corroborated that the patient is in optimal conditions, their departure from the clinic will be authorized and the necessary recommendations for home management will be given.

6.title: Every step of your recovery will be monitored by us
6.subtitle: Recovery and postoperative controls
6.p1: For Dr. Pérez, it is equally important both the performance of an excellent surgical procedure, as well as the supervision of an adequate postoperative process.
6.p2: For this reason, someone from his work team will contact you the morning after the surgery and generally you are asked to send a video or some photos in order to evaluate your status and your proper evolution. Within Dr. Pérez's work team we have specialized nurses who can, if you agree, make a visit or the necessary home accompaniment.
6.p3: Depending on the type of procedures that have been performed, your postoperative checks will be coordinated with Dr. Pérez, during which the removal of sutures and bandages that are necessary will be carried out, likewise all instructions that guarantee proper evolution will be given to you.
6.p4: Aware that one of the most frequent fears of patients prior to a surgical procedure is postoperative pain and inflammation, Dr. Pérez has worked for years on all those alternatives that allow smoother recoveries and with very minimal inflammatory processes. For this reason he has implemented different therapeutic alternatives of natural medicine for your preoperative preparation, in addition to having atraumatic and minimally invasive surgery techniques.

7.title: Enjoy a natural change made to measure
7.subtitle: Return to normal
7.p1: One of the aspects that generates greatest satisfaction in Dr. Pérez's patients is the possibility of being able to return to their normal activities earlier and safely. This is due to all the measures he carries out both in your previous preparation and within your surgery, aimed at minimizing the postoperative inflammatory process.
7.p2: During your recovery process and according to the evolution you present, you will be given all the information that lets you know which activities you can resume without putting your recovery at risk. It is important that you understand that the results of your surgery will become progressively evident to the extent that the inflammatory process disappears and this is different for each type of procedure.

botox.meta_title: Botox in Bogotá | Non-Surgical Facial Rejuvenation
botox.meta_description: Botox treatment to eliminate wrinkles and expression lines. Natural and safe results. Schedule your appointment with Dr. Andrés Pérez.
botox.title: Botox
botox.main_description_1: Since its FDA approval in 2002, Botox® has become one of the most sought-after aesthetic treatments worldwide. Its ability to
botox.main_description_highlight: soften expression lines quickly, safely, and without surgery
botox.main_description_2: has revolutionized the aesthetic medicine field.
botox.main_description_3: Dr. Pérez has extensive experience in Botox® application, focusing on achieving natural, harmonic results adapted to each patient's facial characteristics.
botox.what_is_it_title: What is Botox and how does it work?
botox.what_is_it_p1: Botox® is a purified protein derived from botulinum toxin type A. Its application in minimal doses directly on certain facial muscles causes a temporary and controlled relaxation, decreasing excessive contraction that causes wrinkles and expression lines.

application_zones.brow_lift: Subtle eyebrow or lip corner lift

botox.result_description: The result is a face with a more rested, fresh, and rejuvenated appearance, without losing natural expression.
botox.medical_uses_p1: Besides aesthetic use, Botox is also used in clinical treatments to improve various conditions:

medical_uses.migraine_desc: decreases frequency and intensity of episodes.
medical_uses.hyperhidrosis_desc: reduces sweat production in armpits, palms, and soles.

botox.technique_p1: Dr. Pérez performs a meticulous facial evaluation prior to each application to identify muscles responsible for expression lines and define exact injection points.

technique_features.needles: Uses ultra-fine needles to minimize discomfort and avoid bruising.
technique_features.anesthesia: Localized anesthesia using cold for greater patient comfort
technique_features.natural_effect: Applies product at strategic points, achieving a natural and expressive effect, without "frozen faces".
technique_features.custom_dose: Adjusts dose and technique according to patient's individual anatomy and needs.

botox.duration_title: How long does Botox effect last?
botox.duration_p1: The Botox effect is not immediate. It begins to be noticed between the 3rd and 5th day after application, reaching maximum effect in approximately 7 to 10 days.
botox.duration_recommendation: To maintain results, it is recommended to repeat treatment twice a year.
botox.side_effects_p1: Botox is a safe treatment when applied by a professional with experience and deep knowledge of facial anatomy.

side_effects.discomfort_desc: Feeling similar to a light pinch

botox.side_effects_recommendation: That's why Dr. Pérez insists on the importance that this treatment be performed exclusively by a certified and trained physician.

q1.question: Does Botox change my facial expression?
q1.answer: No, if applied correctly. The goal is to soften lines without altering your naturalness or expression capacity. Dr. Pérez prioritizes subtle and elegant results.

q2.question: From what age can it be applied?
q2.answer: There is no specific age. It generally begins between 25 and 35 years, either as prevention or treatment of already visible dynamic wrinkles.

q3.question: How long does the session last?
q3.answer: The procedure lasts between 15 and 30 minutes, and requires no recovery time. You can resume your activities immediately.

q4.question: Can it be combined with other treatments?
q4.answer: Yes. Botox can be combined with other procedures such as facial fillers (hyaluronic acid), chemical peel, facial laser, or collagen biostimulators to enhance rejuvenation results.

commitments.c2: Provide different options that allow each patient to choose the one that best suits their needs.

commitments.c4: Offer clear and precise information about each of the procedures planned.
commitments.c5: Maintain all possible care and permanent supervision during each of the pre and postoperative phases.

dr_face.planning_p1: Dr. Perez has a wide range of procedures and surgical techniques that he puts at the service of his patients in order to achieve the best possible result, completely fulfilling the expectations and desires of each of them. There are four pillars on which he bases his surgical practice:

pillars.security_desc: It is one of our highest priorities, which is why Dr. Pérez has a multidisciplinary team of highly experienced anesthesiologists and nurses who will be supervising each stage of your experience both before and after your surgery.
pillars.natural_results_desc: This is one of the reasons why Dr. Pérez has established himself as one of the great references in facial surgery and is consulted by patients from multiple countries around the world.
pillars.lasting_changes_desc: Our goal is to achieve results that are maintained over time, which is why Dr. Pérez performs surgical techniques in which both the mobilization and anchoring of descended tissues to fixed points are carried out.
pillars.support_desc: There is nothing to worry about because during your entire process, both before and after your surgery, you will be under the supervision of both Dr. Pérez and his work staff, in order to provide you with a safe and very pleasant experience.

q1.question: Anesthesia
q1.answer: Generally, the procedure is carried out under local anesthesia and intravenous sedation. The surgical time is approximately one and a half hours.

q2.question: What to expect after surgery?
q2.answer: During the first two days, moderate swelling in the eyelids is normal. This decreases progressively and, in most cases, from the fourth day it is little noticeable. Sutures are removed between postoperative day 5 and 6. Once the wounds are completely healed, Dr. Pérez will indicate the use of a specialized healing cream to optimize recovery and improve the aesthetic result.

q3.question: Is it normal to have blurred vision?
q3.answer: Yes, in some cases slightly blurred vision may occur during the first few days. This can be due to the use of ophthalmic lubricating drops or slight inflammation of the conjunctiva. It is a temporary effect that resolves spontaneously without the need for additional treatment.

q4.question: When can I apply makeup?
q4.answer: Makeup on the eye area can be applied once the sutures have been removed, that is, from the fifth day after surgery, provided the skin is in good condition.

q5.question: Can I watch screens after surgery?
q5.answer: During the first two days, it is recommended to avoid prolonged use of screens (computer, cell phone, or television), as inflammation can generate dryness, burning, or eye fatigue. From the third day, it is possible to resume their use, preferably in short periods and with frequent breaks to not strain the eyes.

lifting_facial_hamaca.title: Hammock Facelift
lifting_facial_hamaca.p1: The process of facial aging is inevitable, but it often becomes evident in the most everyday moments: looking in the mirror, taking a photo, or interacting with other people. These changes, although natural, can affect our security and self-esteem by not reflecting how we really feel inside.
lifting_facial_hamaca.p2: Fortunately, the Hammock Facelift procedure carried out by Dr. Pérez is the ideal solution you are looking for.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section2_title: Rediscover your best version with the Hammock Facelift
lifting_facial_hamaca.section2_p1: Facial aging is an inevitable process, but it often becomes evident in the most everyday moments: looking in the mirror, taking a photo, or interacting with other people. These changes, although natural, can affect our security and self-esteem by not reflecting how we really feel inside.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section2_p2: Aware of this reality, Dr. Andrés Pérez has dedicated years of experience, study, and refinement to develop his exclusive Hammock Facelift technique.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section2_p3: This procedure has been carefully designed to adapt to the particularities of each patient, achieving results that not only rejuvenate the face but do so in a subtle, harmonious, and lasting way.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section3_p1: The Hammock Facelift is a safe, effective surgical technique supported by results that reflect beauty, naturalness, and permanence over time.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section3_p2: The success of this surgical technique lies in the comprehensive and personalized vision of Dr. Andrés Pérez. During the assessment consultation, Dr. Pérez designs a unique surgical plan for each patient, precisely addressing the three main causes of facial aging: tissue sagging, volume loss, and changes in skin quality.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section4_p1: One of the most evident and transformative changes of facial aging is the progressive descent of soft tissues. This displacement occurs vertically, starting in the upper part of the face and advancing towards the lower area, causing a loss of firmness and definition.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section4_p2: When we are young, the facial contour tends to have a triangular shape or "inverted triangle", with the widest base in the upper area of the face (cheekbones) and the vertex pointing towards the chin.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section4_p3: However, with the passage of time and the natural aging process, the facial tissues begin to lose collagen, elastin, and volume. The skin becomes looser and fat compartments descend, causing a loss of definition in the cheekbones and an accumulation of volume in the lower part of the face, such as the jaw and neck. This progressive change transforms the facial shape from an inverted triangle to a more square or rectangular figure.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section5_p1: The Hammock Facelift is an advanced rejuvenation technique developed by Dr. Andrés Pérez, offering an innovative and effective solution to treat facial sagging. Unlike traditional methods that only act on the superficial layers, this technique works in depth "Deep Plane", strategically repositioning the internal tissues of the face through a suspension in the form of a "hammock". This allows the structures of the middle and lower third of the face to be lifted naturally, achieving a harmonious restoration of facial contours.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section5_p2: The result is a comprehensive rejuvenation, without excessive tension or loss of expression, preserving the naturalness of the face. The Hammock Facelift is especially indicated for those seeking lasting results and a revitalized appearance, respecting the authenticity of their features.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section6_p1: To effectively reverse the sagging of soft tissues and achieve harmonious facial rejuvenation, Dr. Andrés Pérez carefully combines different surgical procedures, selected according to the unique needs of each patient.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section7_p1: Over time, the face loses volume and firmness due to the decrease in facial fatty tissue, generating a thinner and sunken appearance.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section7_p2: To reverse these signs of aging, Dr. Andrés Pérez performs Lipofilling with stem cells: an advanced technique that extracts, purifies, and transfers autologous fat to areas that require it.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section7_p3: This treatment not only restores volume naturally and lastingly but also improves skin quality thanks to the regenerative properties of stem cells.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section8_title: Restore freshness and vitality to the skin
lifting_facial_hamaca.section8_p1: As we age, the skin of the face undergoes significant structural changes: it thins, loses elasticity and tone, and begins to show visible signs such as sagging and wrinkles.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section8_p2: To counteract these effects, Dr. Andrés Pérez uses the Nano Fat technique, an advanced treatment that consists of the injection of ultra-purified fat into the most superficial layers of the skin. This fat, rich in regenerative factors and stem cells, acts by stimulating cell renewal, visibly improving the texture, brightness, and general quality of the skin.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section9_title: Naturalness and precision: the key to the Hammock Facelift
lifting_facial_hamaca.section9_p1: Many of the traditional facial rejuvenation techniques, commonly known as "facelifts", focus solely on pulling the skin horizontally, generally towards the ears. This superficial approach can generate unnatural results, with overly tense and disharmonious faces.
lifting_facial_hamaca.section9_p2: In contrast, the Hammock Facelift developed by Dr. Andrés Pérez completely avoids these drawbacks thanks to a much deeper and anatomically precise surgical approach. This technique focuses on the mobilization and vertical repositioning of deep soft tissues, specifically the Superficial Musculoaponeurotic System (SMAS), which is the true structural support of the face.

lifting_facial_hamaca.recovery_p1: Recovery after facial rejuvenation with Dr. Andrés Pérez resembles a roller coaster: with some ups and downs at the beginning, but always moving towards a great result.
lifting_facial_hamaca.recovery_p2: Thanks to his precise and low-traumatic techniques, bruises are uncommon and inflammation, although notable in the first 24 hours, begins to decrease constantly. By the fourth or fifth day, many patients resume their daily activities.
lifting_facial_hamaca.recovery_p3: During the following weeks, residual inflammation subsides progressively, and the face reveals a fresher, more harmonious, and rejuvenated appearance.
lifting_facial_hamaca.recovery_p4: Although the journey may have ups and downs, the destination is a naturally revitalized face.

q1.question: What is the Hammock Facelift?
q1.answer: It is an advanced facial rejuvenation technique that uses the Deep Plane method to achieve natural and lasting results, lifting tissues comprehensively.

q2.question: How long does recovery take?
q2.answer: Initial recovery is 7-10 days, with immediate visible results. Complete recovery takes approximately 3-4 weeks.

q3.question: Are the results permanent?
q3.answer: Results last between 8-12 years, depending on individual factors such as age, skin care, and lifestyle.

q4.question: Is the procedure painful?
q4.answer: It is performed under general anesthesia, so there is no pain during the procedure. Postoperative care is managed with effective analgesics.

q5.question: What differentiates Dr. Pérez in this technique?
q5.answer: Dr. Pérez is a specialist in the Deep Plane technique with over 15 years of experience, guaranteeing natural and safe results.

doctor_page.meta_title: Meet Dr. Andrés Pérez Nieto | Facial Plastic Surgeon
doctor_page.meta_description: Expert plastic surgeon in facial rejuvenation and aesthetic surgery in Colombia. Over 30 years of experience and international training.
doctor_page.title: Dr. Andrés Pérez Nieto
doctor_page.subtitle: International Plastic Surgeon
doctor_page.passion_p1: Dr. Pérez completed his undergraduate medical studies at the Universidad del Rosario in Bogotá. It was there that his tireless interest in plastic surgery was awakened after attending various facial reconstruction procedures as a student.
doctor_page.passion_p2: Once he finished his medical studies, he had the honor of entering postgraduate studies at the prestigious plastic surgery program of the Universidad Nacional de Colombia. It was there that he trained as a comprehensive plastic surgeon, both in the reconstructive and aesthetic areas, and had the honor of being elected chief resident of the plastic surgery service due to his academic merits and surgical performance.
doctor_page.passion_p3: Subsequently, he traveled to the United States where he completed a Fellow observer in facial aesthetic surgery at two of the most prestigious institutions in the field, such as The University of Illinois and The Manhattan Eye and Ear Hospital in New York.
doctor_page.passion_p4: 30 years ago, Dr. Pérez established his practice in the city of Bogotá and since then he has maintained a permanent desire to innovate and update himself on the most advanced surgical techniques and technologies available. This has led him to visit important plastic surgery centers in various parts of the world, sharing and developing many of his ideas with plastic surgeons of the highest level.
doctor_page.philosophy_title: A deep aesthetic sense and innate surgical skills merge into a practice tailored to each patient
doctor_page.philosophy_p1: With nearly 30 years of experience, Dr. Pérez has perfected the balance between aesthetics and science, combining his great artistic sense with high-level surgical skills. His passion for art in all its expressions has allowed him to develop a unique approach to facial plastic surgery, where each procedure is a masterpiece designed to highlight the natural beauty of his patients.
doctor_page.philosophy_p2: His commitment to excellence and facial harmony have made him a benchmark in
doctor_page.philosophy_p3: his field, providing results that reflect naturalness, elegance, and precision.
doctor_page.social_commitment_p1: In addition to being a renowned facial plastic surgeon, Dr. Pérez has a deep commitment to social work. As a member of the Milwaukee Medical Mission, an organization of the Medical College of Wisconsin, he actively participates in surgical missions in Colombia where, together with a team of top-level specialists, they provide reconstructive plastic surgeries to low-income patients.
doctor_page.social_commitment_p2: This initiative allows people with congenital malformations, burn sequelae, and other conditions to access surgical treatments that significantly improve their quality of life. For Dr. Pérez, plastic surgery is not only an art but also a tool to restore confidence, functionality, and hope to those who need it most.

mamoplastia_aumento.meta_title: Breast Augmentation in Bogotá | Breast Implants
mamoplastia_aumento.meta_description: Increase volume and improve the shape of your bust. Safe breast implant surgery with harmonious results. Dr. Andrés Pérez.
mamoplastia_aumento.title: Breast Augmentation:
mamoplastia_aumento.subtitle: Improving bust volume and shape
mamoplastia_aumento.description: Breast augmentation is one of the most performed plastic surgery procedures worldwide. It is indicated in women who wish to improve the size, shape, and projection of their breasts, whether for aesthetic reasons, changes after pregnancy, or particular anatomical conditions.
mamoplastia_aumento.candidates_title: Who usually consults for a breast augmentation?
mamoplastia_aumento.candidates_group1_title: Women in their 30s, many with a history of pregnancy and breastfeeding:
mamoplastia_aumento.candidates_group1_desc: This is the most common group. They are patients who have experienced a loss of breast volume, especially in the upper part of the bust, as well as a decrease in firmness and skin tone.
mamoplastia_aumento.candidates_group2_desc: They seek a size increase that allows them to achieve a more harmonious and balanced body, improving their body projection and self-confidence.
mamoplastia_aumento.candidates_group3_title: Patients with breast asymmetries or deformities:
mamoplastia_aumento.candidates_group3_desc: Some women present noticeable differences between both breasts or congenital deformities. In this group, said asymmetries can be corrected, providing a natural and balanced result.
mamoplastia_aumento.important_note_title: Important to keep in mind: What if the breasts are sagging?
mamoplastia_aumento.important_note_desc: It is fundamental to clarify that breast augmentation does not correct breast sagging or ptosis by itself. When breasts are descended, the ideal procedure is a combined breast lift (mastopexy) surgery with implant placement, to restore both the shape and position of the breast.
mamoplastia_aumento.technique_desc: Dr. Pérez's approach to breast augmentation is based on achieving an aesthetic result that not only meets the patient's expectations but also looks natural and harmonious with the rest of the body. Each surgery is carefully planned individually, taking into account multiple anatomical and personal factors.
mamoplastia_aumento.planning_desc: During the initial consultation, Dr. Pérez performs a comprehensive evaluation that includes aspects such as height, chest width, skin quality, and user biotype. With this information, the following are precisely defined:
mamoplastia_aumento.planning_list:
• The appropriate implant volume.
• The type of implant (texture, shape, projection).
• The ideal location to obtain the best aesthetic result.
mamoplastia_aumento.incision_desc: In most cases, Dr. Pérez uses the periareolar incision, which is performed discreetly around the lower half of the areola. This location allows effective access to place the implant and, at the same time, a practically imperceptible final scar.
mamoplastia_aumento.dual_plane_desc: The technique preferred by Dr. Pérez is Dual Plane, in which the implant is placed partially behind the pectoralis major muscle. This technique offers multiple advantages:
mamoplastia_aumento.dual_plane_list:
• Result with a more natural appearance.
• Better transition between the chest and the implant.
• Lower risk of the implant being visible or palpable over time.
• Reduction of the risk of capsular contracture.
mamoplastia_aumento.closure_desc: To finish the procedure, Dr. Pérez performs wound closure with absorbable sutures, which avoids the need to remove stitches later and favors more aesthetic scarring.

q1.question: Anesthesia
q1.answer: The intervention is carried out under general anesthesia and lasts approximately 1 hour.

q2.question: What to expect after surgery?
q2.answer:
It is normal to experience moderate inflammation during the first postoperative week. During this period, breasts may appear larger than they will be once the inflammation subsides.

It is also common to experience temporary stiffness in the chest area, which improves considerably over the days.

Initially, breasts look a bit "separated", but this changes during the inflammatory process, and once inflammation improves, everything returns to normal in approximately 15 days.

q3.question: Postoperative recommendations
q3.answer:
• Maintain adequate hygiene following Dr. Pérez's instructions during the first days to facilitate inflammation drainage.
• Avoid lifting weight over the breasts during the first 10 hours allowing to reduce inflammation.
• Use the permanent girdle for the recommended time, both day and night (according to procedure indications).

q4.question: What types of implants exist?
q4.answer:
Silicone implants according to main characteristics:
• Cover texture.
• Profile (High profile, moderate, low profile) standard depends on anatomical factors and body (measurements).
• Projection also depends on chest measurements (width height).
• Shape: anatomical and round.
Dr. Pérez will help you review the appropriate options based on the specific anatomy available offering the most suitable features for each case. Also aspects such as aesthetic goals and specific patient characteristics.

q5.question: What is capsular contracture?
q5.answer: As a natural body response, a thin capsule (membrane) forms around the implant after its placement. Thereafter, usually the formed capsule remains flexible and soft, allowing natural breast movement. In a small percentage of patients, the capsule may harden and contract in variable degrees.

rinoplastia.title: Rhinoplasty
rinoplastia.subtitle: Facial harmony with natural and functional results
rinoplastia.description_p1: The nose is one of the most important structures of the face. Its shape, proportion, and position significantly influence the perception of facial harmony.
rinoplastia.description_p2: Since his specialization stage in plastic surgery, Dr. Pérez has developed a deep passion for rhinoplasty. This vocation led him to perfect his technique training in the United States with two world leaders in nasal surgery: Dr. Eugene Tardy and Dr. Dean Toriumi, at the University of Illinois. With over 25 years of experience and more than 2,000 rhinoplasties performed, Dr. Pérez has created a comprehensive surgical approach, focused on aesthetic harmony, functionality, and naturalness.
rinoplastia.integral_focus_subtitle: Beyond the nose: complete facial harmony
rinoplastia.integral_focus_desc: Face analysis is not limited only to the nose. Dr. Pérez performs a comprehensive facial evaluation that includes key areas such as the chin and lips, as these zones play a crucial role in overall aesthetic balance. This detailed assessment allows designing a personalized surgical plan that enhances facial harmony.
rinoplastia.respiratory_function_desc: The main function of the nose is to allow adequate air passage to the lungs. Many patients consulting Dr. Pérez present respiratory difficulties caused by septum deviations, turbinate hypertrophy, or other anatomical alterations. His surgical technique allows not only improving nasal aesthetics but also correcting these functional problems, ensuring optimal breathing.
rinoplastia.naturalness_subtitle: Results that enhance, do not transform.
rinoplastia.naturalness_desc: For Dr. Pérez, a good rhinoplasty does not seek to completely change the patient's appearance, but to enhance their natural beauty. His goal is to achieve a harmonious, balanced, and lasting result, which leaves no visible traces or compromises nasal function. Each intervention focuses on highlighting features naturally and without exaggerations.
rinoplastia.technique_title:
Dr. Pérez's technique - Preservation open
rhinoplasty
rinoplastia.technique_desc: Most of his patients are treated with preservation open rhinoplasty technique, a modern and advanced approach offering multiple benefits over traditional techniques
rinoplastia.technique_list_1: • Anatomical preservation: Original nose structures are respected, modifying their form or position without eliminating them, reducing the risk of long-term aesthetic or functional complications.
rinoplastia.technique_list_2: • Precise visualization: The open technique allows direct and detailed vision of the nasal dorsum, tip, septum, and other internal structures, guaranteeing greater surgical precision.
rinoplastia.technique_list_3: • Greater symmetry and durability: Results are more stable and harmonious over time.
rinoplastia.technique_list_4: • Complete functional correction: This technique facilitates the treatment of respiratory alterations such as turbinate problems, septum deviations, or nasal valve dysfunction.
rinoplastia.technique_conclusion: The technique developed by Dr. Pérez aligns with the highest international standards of modern rhinoplasty, prioritizing structural preservation to obtain safe, natural, and functional results.
rinoplastia.candidate_1: People who wish to improve the shape, size, or proportion of their nose to achieve greater facial harmony.
rinoplastia.candidate_2: Patients presenting nasal obstruction caused by structural alterations such as septum deviations or turbinate hypertrophy.
rinoplastia.candidate_3: Those with functional or aesthetic sequelae derived from trauma or previous nose surgeries.

q1.question: Anesthesia
q1.answer: Rhinoplasty is performed under general anesthesia, ensuring greater comfort and safety for the patient. The procedure duration can vary between 1 and 3 hours, depending on the complexity of the case.

q2.question: What should you do before surgery?
q2.answer: After the intervention, it is common to present inflammation located in the cheeks and lower eyelids. To attenuate this, it is advised: • Only sleep with head elevated the first days • Use light ice for application • Avoid heavy exercise or exposure and 7 days of the procedure • Be patient with the recovery process.

q3.question: At what age is it recommended to perform it?
q3.answer: Rhinoplasty can be performed once basic facial development is complete, which normally occurs around 16-17 years in women and 17-18 years in men. However, there is no maximum age limit provided the patient has good general health and realistic procedure expectations.

q4.question: How long does inflammation last?
q4.answer: Most of the inflammation disappears in a week to 10 days, but a small amount may persist for months. This residual inflammation is practically invisible to others but can be noticed by the patient. To facilitate the desinflammation process, it is important to carefully follow surgeon's instructions during the postoperative period.

q5.question: How does nose surgery differ?
q5.answer: Each case is unique and each type of rhinoplasty can use different procedure types. For example, an open technique (external incision) or closed (internal incisions) can be performed. The method choice depends mainly on each patient's specific nasal anatomy as well as their aesthetic goals.

q6.question: What results can I expect?
q6.answer: General results of rhinoplasty are permanent and improve over time until finalizing completely around 12-18 months post-surgery. It is important to maintain realistic expectations since although final rhinoplasty results are significant, the goal is to create a nose that looks harmonious with facial features, creating a natural and balanced look.

q7.question: Postoperative recommendations
q7.answer: • Keep head elevated especially during the first days after surgery. • Avoid intense physical activities during the first week. • Strictly follow all medical indications to achieve optimal results. • Attend all scheduled follow-up appointments.

q8.question: What results does complete rhinoplasty offer?
q8.answer: In most cases, Dr. Pérez performs a functional Rhinoplasty through the postoperative period, thanks to which we not only achieve a more harmonious aesthetic, but we also improve respiratory functionality, not affecting airways, on the contrary, because the procedure respects nasal function.

otoplastia.title: Otoplasty:
otoplastia.subtitle: Cosmetic Ear Surgery
otoplastia.description_p1: Otoplasty is a surgical procedure designed to correct alterations in the shape, size, or position of the ears, whether congenital or acquired. The most common of these alterations is known as "prominent ears", in which the auricles protrude more than usual, generating a disproportionate appearance with the rest of the face.
otoplastia.description_p2: In addition to aesthetics, Otoplasty fulfills an important emotional function, especially in children, as it helps prevent self-esteem problems or school teasing. For this reason, it is recommended to perform it between 8 and 10 years of age, once auricular development is practically complete.
otoplastia.technique_intro: Dr. Pérez employs a highly refined, safe, and effective technique, with natural and lasting results: The intervention is performed through an incision hidden in the back of the ear, ensuring an invisible scar.
otoplastia.technique_step1: Auricular cartilage is remodeled to correct excessive projection, and permanent sutures are placed bringing the ear closer to the skull, restoring a harmonious position.
otoplastia.technique_step2: The result respects the natural curvatures of the ear, so the final appearance is completely natural and aesthetic.
otoplastia.technique_step3: Closure is performed with absorbable sutures, so removal is not necessary.
otoplastia.meta_title: Otoplasty in Bogotá | Ear Surgery | Dr. Andrés Pérez
otoplastia.meta_description: Correction of prominent ears with Otoplasty. Safe procedure for children and adults. Improve your self-esteem and facial harmony.

q1.question: Anesthesia
q1.answer:
In patients under 12 years, it is recommended to perform surgery under general anesthesia for greater comfort and safety.
In adolescents and adults, it can be performed with local anesthesia and sedation.

q2.question: Postoperative and Recovery
q2.answer:
After the procedure, a soft bandage is placed around the head, helping protect the ears and control inflammation. This bandage is removed between 2 and 3 days after surgery.
Postoperative recommendations:
• Sleep in a semi-seated position (30°) to facilitate inflammation drainage.
• Avoid contact physical activities during the first 15 days.
• Carefully follow Dr. Pérez's instructions to guarantee optimal recovery.

q3.question: When can I resume my activities?
q3.answer: Most patients can return to their usual routines from the third or fourth postoperative day.

mentoplastia.title: Mentoplasty
mentoplastia.description: A balanced mandibular contour is key to an aesthetically harmonious face, both in men and women. Mentoplasty is a surgical procedure allowing projection and definition of the chin, achieving a significant improvement not only in the facial profile but also in neck appearance.
mentoplastia.technique_intro: Dr. Pérez performs this procedure through the insertion of a silastic implant (soft silicone), specifically designed to adapt to each patient's anatomy. His focus is based on creating a natural, safe, and lasting result.
mentoplastia.technique_step1: Discreet external incision: Prefers performing intervention through a small incision located in the natural skin fold under the chin, right where it meets the neck. This location allows excellent scarring and minimizes complication risks.
mentoplastia.technique_step2: Personalized anatomical implants: Dr. Pérez uses implants with lateral extensions, guaranteeing perfect integration with mandibular contour and preventing implant visibility or palpability over time.
mentoplastia.technique_step3: Avoids intraoral route, as this may increase infection risk by being in contact with saliva.
mentoplastia.candidates_desc: Mentoplasty is indicated for patients presenting a small or retracted chin, which can alter facial balance, especially in its relationship with the nose. This condition is usually hereditary and can be corrected once facial development is finished, generally at the end of adolescence.
mentoplastia.meta_title: Mentoplasty in Bogotá | Chin Surgery | Dr. Andrés Pérez
mentoplastia.meta_description: Improve your profile and define your mandibular contour with a chin implant. Natural and harmonious results. Schedule your assessment.

q1.question: Anesthesia and Combined Procedures
q1.answer: • If performed in isolation, mentoplasty can be carried out under local anesthesia with sedation. • It is frequently combined with rhinoplasty, as it allows achieving comprehensive aesthetic improvement of the facial profile in a single procedure.

q2.question: How long does a chin implant last?
q2.answer: Silastic implants used today are highly biocompatible and stable, so they do not require replacement over time, except in exceptional cases.

q3.question: Are there other surgical options?
q3.answer: Yes. In patients with extremely retracted chins, it may be necessary to resort to a technique called sliding genioplasty, which consists of performing a controlled bone cut (osteotomy) and advancing it forward, fixing it with titanium microplates.

bichectomia.title:
Bichectomy
Buccal Fat Removal
bichectomia.subtitle: More defined and harmonious facial contour
bichectomia.description_p1: Bichat's bags are accumulations of fat located inside the cheeks that, depending on their size, provide volume to this area of the face. In certain patients, this volume can generate a rounded or poorly defined facial appearance.
bichectomia.description_p2: Bichectomy is a minimally invasive surgical procedure that seeks to strictly remove part of these fat bags to achieve a thinner, more stylized face with greater definition in the cheekbone area.
bichectomia.technique_intro: With over 25 years of experience, Dr. Pérez performs this surgery with a conservative and highly aesthetic approach, always taking care of long-term facial harmony. His technique is characterized by:
bichectomia.technique_step1: Performing a small intraoral incision, that is, inside the mouth, which guarantees the absence of visible scars.
bichectomia.technique_step2: Carrying out a partial and controlled resection of Bichat's bags, avoiding an excessive result that could generate sinking or an aged appearance over time.
bichectomia.technique_step3: Using absorbable sutures, which facilitates recovery and avoids the need to remove stitches.
bichectomia.candidate_1: Patients with rounded faces or prominent cheeks who desire a more sculpted appearance.
bichectomia.candidate_2: People who seek to highlight their cheekbones and profile their facial contour.
bichectomia.candidate_3: Over 18 years of age, once facial bone development is complete.
bichectomia.decision_title: A decision based on criteria and experience
bichectomia.decision_desc: Dr. Pérez highlights the importance of a prior professional assessment to determine if bichectomy is really necessary. Many patients request this procedure without being ideal candidates, so an honest and detailed evaluation is key to obtaining natural and harmonious results.
bichectomia.meta_title: Bichectomy in Bogotá | Facial Thinning | Dr. Andrés Pérez
bichectomia.meta_description: Define your cheekbones and stylize your face with Bichectomy. Quick, safe procedure without visible scars. Natural results.

q1.question: Anesthesia and duration
q1.answer: This procedure is generally performed with local anesthesia and sedation, and lasts approximately 30 to 45 minutes per session, allowing rapid recovery without hospitalization.

q2.question: Postoperative and recovery
q2.answer:
It is common to present moderate inflammation in the cheeks during the first days, which decreases progressively.
Dr. Pérez's recommendations for optimal recovery:
• Maintain a semi-seated position (30 degrees), especially during rest, to reduce inflammation.
• Apply local cold to the cheeks during the first 48 hours.
• Perform mouth rinses with antiseptic during the first 5 days to maintain hygiene and avoid infections.

lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.title: Cheek and Neck Hammock Lift
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.subtitle: The Facial Hammock: Understanding Cheek and Neck Aging
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.description_p1: The structure of the soft tissues of the face, especially in the cheeks and neck, can be compared to a natural hammock that stretches from one side of the face to the other, suspended by anatomical anchor points. This "facial hammock" is, in medical terms, what we know as the SMAS (superficial musculoaponeurotic system), which is made up of fat, facial muscles, and fibrous sheets, all covered by skin.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.description_p2: Over time, this facial support system begins to weaken as part of the natural aging process. The skin loses elasticity, fat compartments also shift position, and ligaments relax. As a result, this hammock begins to sag and descend, causing progressive tissue drooping.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.description_p3: These changes not only modify appearance but also the aesthetic balance of the face, causing the angles and firmness that characterize a young physiognomy to be lost.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.description_p4: Understanding this anatomical dynamic is key to offering effective rejuvenation solutions. Advanced surgical techniques, such as the Hammock Facelift of the cheeks and neck developed by Dr. Andrés Pérez, are specifically designed to reposition and tighten this network of tissues from its deep base, restoring facial tension and harmony naturally and permanently.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.technique_title: Our Cheek and Neck Hammock Lift Technique
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.technique_question: When to consider a Cheek and Neck Hammock Lift?
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.technique_intro: Signs of facial aging appear progressively, and their onset does not depend solely on chronological age. Hereditary factors, lifestyle, sun exposure, diet, stress, and habits such as smoking significantly influence the speed and way the face ages.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.technique_desc: The Cheek and Neck Hammock Lift, developed by Dr. Andrés Pérez, is especially indicated for patients presenting visible alterations in face and neck definition, associated with the sagging and weakening of deep soft tissues.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.technique_signs: Among the most common signs that may indicate a person is a candidate for this procedure are:
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.sign_1: Loss of facial contour, a product of cheek descent and loss of support in the mid-face. This generates a tired look, with greater prominence of nasolabial folds and loss of mandibular contour (commonly known as "jowls").
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.sign_2: Neck with poor definition and little angulation, due to excess skin and sagging of the platysma muscle, which gives rise to a less stylized profile and the formation of visible bands or folds.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.versatile_technique_p1: Both the Mini Hammock Lift and the Extended Hammock Lift, developed by Dr. Andrés Pérez, are based on the renowned Deep Plane technique, considered one of the most advanced and effective in facial rejuvenation surgery.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.versatile_technique_p2: Unlike conventional facelifts that only tighten the skin, the Deep Plane approach acts on the deeper layers of the face. It repositions underlying muscles and tissues, and releases ligaments that restrict their mobility, without generating surface tension, allowing for longer-lasting results and a completely natural appearance.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.variant_title: Which variant is right for you?
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.mini_lifting_desc: Indicated for young patients or those with mild to moderate facial and cervical sagging.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.mini_lifting_list_1: ✓ Short incision, discreetly located in front of the ears.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.mini_lifting_list_2: ✓ Deep tissue repositioning with minimal invasion.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.mini_lifting_list_3: ✓ Faster recovery and virtually invisible scars.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.mini_lifting_list_4: ✓ Ideal for those seeking a subtle but significant improvement, preserving a natural look.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.mini_lifting_footer: This procedure is perfect for those who wish to prevent more advanced aging or restore facial freshness without drastic changes.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.extended_lifting_desc: Designed for patients with a greater degree of aging and marked sagging.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.extended_lifting_list_1: ✓ Incisions in front of and behind the ears for wider access.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.extended_lifting_list_2: ✓ Allows complete repositioning of cheeks, jaw, and neck.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.extended_lifting_list_3: ✓ May include a submental incision (under the chin) to remove localized fat, correct muscle bands, and redefine the cervical angle.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.extended_lifting_list_4: ✓ Offers more transformative results, always preserving the natural expression of the face.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.extended_lifting_footer: This lift provides a comprehensive and effective solution for those wishing to restore facial architecture deeply and harmoniously.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.why_deep_plane_title: Why choose a Deep Plane technique?
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.why_deep_plane_desc: Both variants offer notable benefits over traditional facelifts:
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.benefit_3: Maintenance of the patient's identity and expression
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.benefit_4: Low risk of distortion of facial features
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.why_deep_plane_footer: These techniques represent an advanced, safe, and personalized alternative for those desiring high-level facial rejuvenation, with visible but discreet results.
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.invisible_incisions_desc: Dr. Pérez plans and performs the incisions necessary to carry out the Hammock Lift in such a way that he completely camouflages them within the grooves and curves of the ears, making them very little visible to the human eye. Usually, these incisions are practically imperceptible after 2 months.

lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.meta_title: Cheek and Neck Hammock Lift | Dr. Andrés Pérez
lifting_hamaca_mejilla_cuello.meta_description: Advanced Deep Plane technique for facial rejuvenation. Natural and lasting results. Recover the definition of your face and neck.

q1.question: What distinguishes the Hammock Lift from other facial rejuvenation techniques?
q1.answer: The Hammock Lift is based on the Deep Plane technique, one of the most advanced in facial surgery. Unlike traditional lifts that only tighten the skin, this technique acts on the deep layers, repositioning underlying muscles and tissues. This allows for a more complete, natural, and lasting rejuvenation, without generating surface tension or an artificial appearance.

q2.question: How do I know if I am a candidate for the Mini Lift or the Extended Hammock Lift?
q2.answer: The choice depends on the degree of facial aging and the individual structure of the face: • The Mini Hammock Lift is indicated for young patients or those with mild to moderate sagging. • The Extended Hammock Lift is ideal for those presenting more advanced signs of aging, with visible sagging in the cheeks, jaw, and neck. Dr. Pérez performs a personalized evaluation to determine the most suitable technique for you.

q3.question: What advantages does the Deep Plane technique have over other techniques?
q3.answer: The Deep Plane technique offers multiple benefits over conventional methods: • Exceptional durability from its deep base. • Avoids the "pulled face" effect. • Preserves natural facial expression. • Provides more lasting and harmonious results. • Reduces the risk of distortion of facial features.

q4.question: Where are the incisions made and how visible are the scars?
q4.answer: Incisions are strategically placed to minimize their visibility: • In the Mini Lift, they are located in front of the ears. • In the Extended Lift, incisions are added behind the ears and, in some cases, a small incision under the chin. • These are made following the natural folds of the skin or hair lines, so scars are usually very discreet and become almost imperceptible over time.

q5.question: How long do the results of the Hammock Lift last?
q5.answer: Thanks to the depth and precision of the Deep Plane technique, Hammock Lift results can be maintained between 10 and 15 years, depending on factors such as: • Genetics • Skin type and quality • Lifestyle (diet, care, sun exposure, etc.) It is one of the longest-lasting and stable rejuvenation techniques in facial aesthetic surgery.

q6.question: What can I expect after surgery?
q6.answer: It is normal to experience some mild to moderate discomfort during the first few days, such as: • Swelling in treated areas • Appearance of mild bruising, especially on the neck and around incisions • Temporary feeling of tightness Dr. Pérez and his team will provide you with clear and personalized postoperative instructions, as well as continuous follow-up to ensure a safe, comfortable, and effective recovery.

lipofilling_celulas_madre.intro_p1: If you wish to reverse the signs of facial aging, restoring the volume and freshness of your face, stem cell injection is an excellent and reliable alternative that Dr. Pérez makes available to you.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.intro_p2: When referring to stem cells, many people will immediately think of those cells coming from the umbilical cord or bone marrow. Nowadays, it is feasible to obtain stem cells from the fat of our own body.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.intro_p3: For this reason, Dr. Pérez has implemented within his facial rejuvenation techniques, the Stem Cell Lipofilling, a procedure in which stem cells obtained after ultra-purifying the fat are used.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.intro_p4: For Dr. Pérez, it is very important, in addition to lifting and suspending the facial soft tissues that have descended, to restore adequate facial volume, which provides a younger and more attractive appearance.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.types_intro: Facial fat grafting has evolved significantly thanks to advanced techniques allowing treatment customization according to each patient's specific needs. Dr. Andrés Pérez employs two highly specialized modalities: MicroFat and NanoFat, both obtained through ultra-purification processes to guarantee safety, efficacy, and natural results.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.microfat_desc: The MicroFat technique consists of injecting purified fat obtained through fine microcannulas.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.microfat_point_1: It is especially indicated to restore volume in areas of the face that have lost it with aging, such as cheekbones, cheeks, or mandibular region.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.microfat_point_2: It is also used to fill deep furrows and expression lines, such as nasolabial folds and between the eyebrows.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.microfat_point_3: Provides long-lasting correction with a soft and natural appearance.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.nanofat_desc: The NanoFat technique allows injecting inside the skin a liquid fraction of fat rich in stem cells and growth factors, with potent regenerative effects.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.nanofat_point_1: It is applied with ultra-fine needles, allowing treatment of delicate and superficial zones.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.nanofat_point_2: It is ideal for improving skin quality, treating fine expression lines, acne scars, and areas with visible signs of aging.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.nanofat_point_3: It also works as a skin revitalizer, providing luminosity, elasticity, and a more uniform texture.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.types_conclusion: Both techniques can be combined in the same procedure to achieve comprehensive facial rejuvenation, both in volume and skin quality, with natural and lasting results.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.technique_intro: The facial fat grafting procedure is an advanced and natural rejuvenation technique using the patient's own fat to restore volume and improve skin quality. Dr. Andrés Pérez employs a meticulous and highly specialized protocol to guarantee safe, lasting, and aesthetically harmonious results. The process takes place in three main stages:
lipofilling_celulas_madre.step_1_desc: Fat is carefully obtained from donor areas where there is a natural surplus, such as the abdomen or inner thighs. This process is performed using very thin microcannulas allowing gentle and precise collection, without causing unnecessary trauma to tissues.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.step_2_desc: Once extracted, the fat undergoes a rigorous purification process to ensure its maximum quality and viability. Dr. Pérez applies techniques such as centrifugation, filtration, and decantation, eliminating impurities, excess fluids, and oily residues. Depending on the treatment goal, MicroFat (to restore volume) or NanoFat (ideal for improving skin texture and quality) can be prepared, applying additional emulsification and refinement procedures.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.step_3_desc: Finally, the purified fat is injected into specific areas of the face previously evaluated, such as cheekbones, nasolabial folds, dark circles, or mandibular region. This phase is performed with microcannulas or ultra-fine needles allowing controlled and uniform distribution, guaranteeing a natural finish without irregularities. This procedure not only returns volume lost over time but also improves skin quality thanks to the regenerative properties of the stem cells contained in the fat.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.candidate_1: Those patients who, as a result of the facial aging process, have lost volume in some areas of the face generating an aged and unattractive appearance.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.candidate_2: Some young patients generally between 20 and 40 years old, may, for hereditary reasons, present volume losses in certain specific areas such as the tear trough.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.candidate_3: Young patients who for aesthetic reasons wish to obtain more volume in some areas of the face such as cheekbones, lips, or chin.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.candidate_4: It is an excellent option in patients presenting deformities or volume losses secondary to accidents or previous poorly performed surgeries.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.advantage_1: This procedure with ultra-purified fat cells obtained from the same patient eliminates the possibility of rejection or allergic reactions that can occur with synthetic fillers.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.advantage_2: The amount of fat cells needed can be used depending on each particular case, because they are obtained from the patient's own fat deposits.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.advantage_3: Because Lipofilling injects a good amount of stem cells, the results of the procedure are more stable and lasting than with synthetic fillers.
lipofilling_celulas_madre.advantage_4: In addition to providing fat cells and stem cells, Lipofilling carries growth factors which are substances inducing collagen and elastin production in the skin.

q1.question: Anesthesia
q1.answer: Generally, the procedure is carried out under local anesthesia supplemented with sedation.

q2.question: How long do facial fat grafting results last?
q2.answer: Lipofilling results can be very long-lasting, and even permanent, thanks to advanced extraction and purification techniques employed by Dr. Andrés Pérez. The transferred fat, rich in stem cells, not only fills but integrates and progressively improves skin quality over time.

q3.question: Can the procedure be repeated?
q3.answer: Yes. The procedure is safe and repeatable. Ideally, wait at least 12 months to perform a new session, since during that period stem cells have already generated new microvascularization, optimizing the environment for a new application and enhancing global results.

q4.question: How long does it take to see the final result?
q4.answer: The fat grafting effect is gradual. Although initial improvement is noticed in the first weeks, the complete result is observed in the following months, as stem cells stimulate tissue regeneration, improve skin texture, and promote natural collagen production.

q5.question: What areas can be treated with facial Lipofilling?
q5.answer: Fat grafting can be applied in multiple areas of the face: cheekbones, nasolabial folds, tear troughs, chin, jawline, and lips, among others. In addition, the NanoFat version is ideal for improving fine lines, acne scars, and general skin quality.

q6.question: Does lipofilling replace synthetic fillers?
q6.answer: In many cases, yes. Lipofilling offers a more natural and lasting result, without rejection risks that may occur with synthetic substances. Furthermore, containing stem cells, it provides a regenerative benefit that conventional fillers do not offer.
