lip_lift.title: Lip Lift
lip_lift.subtitle: Upper Lip Lift
lip_lift.description: Rejuvenate your expression with more harmonious <br className="hidden sm:block" /> and attractive lips
lip_lift.intro_text: When speaking of facial rejuvenation, areas like lips, eyelids, or even chin are frequently forgotten. However, the lips and their perioral region are key elements in facial aesthetics. For Dr. Pérez, lips are the frame of our most important expressions: smiling, speaking, and kissing. His work is based on the search for harmony and naturalness, understanding that each patient has unique anatomical characteristics requiring measures and techniques that refine their presence.
lip_lift.why_changes_title:
Why does the lip change with
time?
lip_lift.why_changes_intro: Over the years —whether due to genetic causes or natural aging— lips undergo visible transformations:
lip_lift.change_1: The upper lip tends to descend, lengthening the distance between the nose base and the lip edge, generating an aged appearance and dulling facial expression.
lip_lift.change_2: A loss of projection and volume occurs, especially in the upper lip, making lips look thinner and less defined.
lip_lift.change_3: The lower lip may also lose firmness and projection, unbalancing the mouth's natural balance.
lip_lift.changes_conclusion: These changes affect not only smile harmony but also the general perception of youth and vitality of the face.
lip_lift.technique_subtitle: Precision, naturalness, and harmony in every procedure
lip_lift.technique_intro: Dr. Pérez performs the Lip Lift with a meticulous and personalized technique designed to offer natural and lasting results without leaving visible traces.
lip_lift.technique_point_1: • The intervention begins with an incision perfectly located in the natural fold between nasal wings and nose base, allowing complete scar concealment.
lip_lift.technique_point_2: • The skin resection design is shaped like a thin elongated "mustache", carefully adapted to each patient's proportions.
lip_lift.technique_point_3: • Lip elevation is performed symmetrically and precisely, guaranteeing perfect aesthetic balance with the rest of the face.
lip_lift.technique_point_4: • The amount of skin removed is calculated specifically, based on each patient's anatomical characteristics, ensuring a harmonious, youthful, and natural result.
lip_lift.lipofilling_subtitle_bold: Restoring volume and youth with the body's own resources
lip_lift.lipofilling_subtitle: As an ideal complement to the Lip Lift, Dr. Pérez routinely performs a Stem Cell Lipofilling, an advanced technique that returns natural volume to the lip and smoothes aging signs.
lip_lift.lipofilling_point_1: This procedure consists of injecting purified fat rich in stem cells, extracted from the patient themselves, into the lip thickness.
lip_lift.lipofilling_point_2: By using autologous tissue, there are no risks of rejection or adverse reactions.
lip_lift.lipofilling_point_3: Stem cells help not only restore volume but also improve skin quality and natural lip hydration.
lip_lift.lipofilling_point_4: Results are more natural and lasting compared to conventional fillers.
lip_lift.lipofilling_conclusion: A precise technique and a comprehensive perioral rejuvenation approach can transform facial expression. The Lip Lift, together with lip lipofilling, allows recovering a younger, fresher, and balanced appearance, without losing naturalness
lip_lift.meta_title: Lip Lift in Bogotá | Lip Elevation | Dr. Andrés Pérez
lip_lift.meta_description: Rejuvenate your smile with a Lip Lift. Definitive procedure to shorten the upper lip and increase volume. Natural results.

q1.question: What does the Lip Lift or lip elevation consist of?
q1.answer: The Lip Lift modifies the lip shape and specifically permanently lengthens the lip and showing more gum, giving less space between the nose base and the upper lip edge, generating a more youthful appearance.

q2.question: What are the benefits of the procedure?
q2.answer: Recovery time is short; most patients can resume normal social activities after 1-2 weeks. Results are permanent and very natural when a proper procedure is performed.

q3.question: Is the procedure painful?
q3.answer: It is performed under local anesthesia. Discomfort during postoperative is minimal and basic daily life activities are not altered. It can be easily managed with basic analgesics if necessary.

q4.question: At what age can a Lip Lift be performed?
q4.answer: It can be performed from 18 years onwards. Young patients with a long distance between the upper lip and nose base are ideal candidates, regardless of age. Middle-aged patients who have lost lip volume can also benefit from the Lip Lift.

q5.question: What differentiates Lip Lift from facial fillers?
q5.answer: The Lip Lift modifies lip shape and position permanently, shortening the distance between nose and upper lip. Fillers simply give a temporary effect and only add volume.

q6.question: What advantages does stem cell lipofilling have over commercial fillers?
q6.answer: Lipofilling offers a more natural and lasting result, by using the patient's own fat. In addition, fat stem cells improve skin quality, providing hydration and natural stimulation for a younger look.

q7.question: How long do Lip Lift and Lipofilling results last?
q7.answer: The Lip Lift is a permanent modification. Lipofilling changes are also permanent, but a small additional amount may be needed depending on the first weeks, but it is highly recommended that changes are respected, specifically when deciphering results in the anterior plane.

abdominoplastia.title: High Definition Abdominoplasty
abdominoplastia.subtitle: Reshape your Abdomen, Recover your Confidence
abdominoplastia.description: Many women experience notable changes in the shape and appearance of the abdomen due to a variety of factors, among the most common are:
abdominoplastia.cause_1: Pregnancies and the changes they entail in the skin and abdominal musculature.
abdominoplastia.cause_2: Previous abdominal surgeries that leave visible scars or alter aesthetics.
abdominoplastia.cause_3: Significant weight fluctuations, which generate excess skin and loss of firmness.
abdominoplastia.intro_p2: Despite following strict diets, exercise routines, or undergoing non-invasive aesthetic treatments, in many cases it is not possible to recover abdomen firmness and contour without resorting to a definitive surgical solution.
abdominoplastia.candidates_title: Who are candidates for an Abdominoplasty?
abdominoplastia.candidates_intro: Many women experience notable changes in the shape and appearance of the abdomen due to a variety of factors, among the most common are:
abdominoplastia.candidate_1_desc: Presence of redundant skin, especially in the lower abdomen, which does not improve with diet or exercise.
abdominoplastia.candidate_2_desc: Weakening or separation of abdominal muscles (diastasis), which generates a bulging appearance or lack of tone.
abdominoplastia.candidate_3_desc: Visible and unsightly marks resulting from caesarean sections, previous surgeries, or extensive stretch marks that distort the natural shape of the abdomen.
abdominoplastia.technique_intro: Dr. Pérez has perfected a High Definition (HD) Abdominoplasty technique that vastly exceeds the results of conventional abdominal liposuction, by offering not only an aesthetic improvement in the skin, but also a more specialized definition and contour of the abdomen and waist.
abdominoplastia.technique_advantages_title: Advantages of Dr. Pérez's HD Technique
abdominoplastia.advantage_1_title: • Precise molding of the abdomen and waist
abdominoplastia.advantage_1_desc: Unlike the traditional technique that only removes excess skin, HD Abdominoplasty includes comprehensive lipomodelling, eliminating unwanted fat deposits from the abdomen and flanks. This allows better defining body contour and achieving a much more harmonious and natural result.
abdominoplastia.advantage_2_title: • Bikini type incision, discreet and aesthetic
abdominoplastia.advantage_2_desc: Thanks to skin thickness reduction with lipomodelling, Dr. Pérez can locate the final scar in a very low position, just above the pubis, where it is easily hidden by underwear or swimsuits.
abdominoplastia.advantage_3_desc: Each incision is carefully designed before surgery, considering the patient's anatomical proportions, to ensure a symmetrical scar without excess skin on the sides.
abdominoplastia.advantage_4_desc: One of the great advantages of Dr. Pérez's technique is the aesthetic reconstruction of the navel. The new shape is designed so that scars remain completely hidden inside it, avoiding artificial or deformed navels.
abdominoplastia.advantage_5_desc: As part of the procedure, Dr. Pérez performs a plication or reconstruction of the abdominal muscle wall, joining the rectus abdominis muscles that are usually separated by pregnancies or weight gain. This not only flattens the abdomen but also helps accentuate the waist, offering a slimmer and more defined silhouette.
abdominoplastia.other_techniques_title: What other abdominoplasty techniques does Dr. Pérez perform?
abdominoplastia.other_techniques_intro: Understanding that not all patients require the same type of procedure, Dr. Pérez selects the most appropriate surgical technique after a detailed assessment, always prioritizing safety and personalized aesthetic result.
abdominoplastia.mini_tummy_tuck_title: Mini Abdominoplasty or Mini Tummy Tuck
abdominoplastia.mini_tummy_tuck_desc: Indicated for patients presenting moderate excess skin and flaccidity limited exclusively to the lower abdomen.
abdominoplastia.mini_tummy_tuck_point_1: Requires a much shorter incision than the conventional technique.
abdominoplastia.mini_tummy_tuck_point_2: Navel repositioning is not performed, which reduces recovery time.
abdominoplastia.mini_tummy_tuck_point_3: Ideal for thin people with a small "roll" in the lower belly difficult to eliminate with diet and exercise.
abdominoplastia.meta_title: Abdominoplasty in Bogotá | Tummy Tuck | Dr. Andrés Pérez
abdominoplastia.meta_description: Get a flat and defined abdomen with Abdominoplasty. Remove excess skin and fat. Natural and safe results.

q1.question: Anesthesia
q1.answer: The intervention is carried out under general anesthesia and lasts approximately 3 hours.

q2.question: What to expect after surgery?
q2.answer: It is normal to experience moderate inflammation during the first postoperative week. During this period, the abdomen may appear more swollen than it will be once the inflammation subsides.

q3.question: Postoperative recommendations
q3.answer:
• Maintain adequate hygiene following Dr. Pérez's instructions during the first days to facilitate inflammation drainage.
• Avoid lifting weight during the first weeks.
• Use the permanent girdle for the recommended time, both day and night.

elevacion_cola_cejas.title: Eyebrow Tail Lift
elevacion_cola_cejas.subtitle: Restoring the natural and attractive shape of the upper face frame
elevacion_cola_cejas.description_p1: Just like other areas of the face, the eyebrows also suffer a progressive descent as part of the natural aging process. This change alters their original position and significantly affects facial expression.
elevacion_cola_cejas.description_p2: In women, one of the most noticeable transformations is the loss of the elongated curvature that gives femininity and youth to the face. Over time, eyebrows tend to become more horizontal and even tilt downwards in severe cases, giving a tired or sad appearance.
elevacion_cola_cejas.vision_p1: Dr. Pérez considers that the position and shape of the eyebrows are key elements in any facial rejuvenation procedure. Throughout his career, he has carefully studied the features that make eyebrows visually attractive and changes, integrating this knowledge into his surgical techniques to achieve refined and natural results.
elevacion_cola_cejas.vision_p2: Unlike traditional techniques that lift the eyebrows generally—especially those that perform suspensions from the center of the forehead—Dr. Pérez avoids approaches that may generate an artificial expression or a permanent look of surprise.
elevacion_cola_cejas.technique_subtitle: A subtle technique for a more harmonious and rejuvenated look
elevacion_cola_cejas.technique_desc: Dr. Pérez considers that the selective lifting of the eyebrow tail is one of the most effective and aesthetically pleasing interventions to improve facial expression. Unlike techniques that lift the entire eyebrow, his focus is on repositioning only the outer part, preserving the naturalness of the face and avoiding artificial or exaggerated expressions.
elevacion_cola_cejas.benefit_1: Restores the natural and harmonious shape of the eyebrow, positioning the tail slightly higher than the head, which softens and stylizes the gaze.
elevacion_cola_cejas.benefit_2: Reduces excess skin on the upper eyelids, providing a more rested and youthful appearance.
elevacion_cola_cejas.benefit_3: Notably and lastingly improves expression lines in the lateral eye area, known as 'crow's feet'.
elevacion_cola_cejas.custom_techniques_intro: Dr. Pérez uses surgical variants for the lifting of the eyebrow tail, selecting the most appropriate one according to the patient's anatomy and expectations. One of the most frequently used is:
elevacion_cola_cejas.short_temporal_desc: This technique is performed through a small incision within the scalp, in the temple region, allowing the scar to be completely hidden. Through this opening, a careful detachment of the tissues around the eyebrows is carried out, followed by their lifting and fixation using high-precision surgical sutures.
elevacion_cola_cejas.short_temporal_point_1: Invisible scar as it remains completely inside the hair.
elevacion_cola_cejas.short_temporal_point_3: Natural and harmonious result, without altering facial expression.
elevacion_cola_cejas.extended_temporal_desc: The intervention is performed through an incision discreetly located in the hairline, just above the sideburns. This strategic location allows the scar to be completely hidden and without visible evidence after recovery.
elevacion_cola_cejas.extended_temporal_point_1: Precise resection of excess skin in the lateral eye region, notably improving expression lines or crow's feet.
elevacion_cola_cejas.extended_temporal_point_2: Natural lifting of the orbicularis muscle (around the eyelids) and eyebrows, achieving a more open, harmonious, and youthful look.
elevacion_cola_cejas.extended_temporal_point_3: Improves the contour of the upper third of the face simultaneously.
elevacion_cola_cejas.extended_temporal_point_4: Technique combined with other procedures such as facelift or blepharoplasty.
elevacion_cola_cejas.extended_temporal_point_5: Rapid recovery and without artificial changes in facial expression.
elevacion_cola_cejas.candidate_1: Patients presenting descent and loss of the normal shape and position of the eyebrows.
elevacion_cola_cejas.candidate_2: Patients consulting for blepharoplasty, for whom Dr. Pérez recommends simultaneous eyebrow tail lifting to achieve better definition of the upper eyelids.
elevacion_cola_cejas.candidate_3: Those patients presenting pronounced expression lines in the crow's feet area.
elevacion_cola_cejas.meta_title: Eyebrow Tail Lift in Bogotá | Brow Lift | Dr. Andrés Pérez
elevacion_cola_cejas.meta_description: Rejuvenate your gaze with the eyebrow tail lift. Minimally invasive procedure for a fresher and more youthful expression.

q1.question: Anesthesia
q1.answer: The eyebrow tail lift procedure is usually carried out simultaneously with blepharoplasty, which is why its anesthesia is local with sedation.

q2.question: What to expect after surgery?
q2.answer: It is normal to have mild inflammation involving the temple area. Bruising appears very rarely, however, in some cases due to inflammation, the eye areas may be seen a little higher than normal, which disappears completely in a few days.

q3.question: Postoperative Recommendations
q3.answer: It is recommended to maintain a semi-seated position at 45 degrees to facilitate better drainage of inflammation and healing of the operated site, and apply a compress to prevent scabs from forming and adhering to the hair.

q4.question: Can the procedure be performed if Botox has been applied previously?
q4.answer: Yes, it can be performed, and even having applied Botox previously, the muscles are more relaxed and therefore easier to work with.

explantacion_mamaria.title: Breast Explantation
explantacion_mamaria.subtitle: Removal of breast implants with or without tissue reconstruction
explantacion_mamaria.intro_p1: More and more women around the world are considering breast explantation as an alternative to recover physical, emotional, and aesthetic well-being, whether for personal, medical reasons or simply because they feel that their implants are no longer part of their identity.
explantacion_mamaria.intro_p2: Dr. Pérez has extensive experience in breast implant removal surgery, offering an individualized approach that prioritizes the safety, aesthetics, and expectations of each patient.
explantacion_mamaria.when_to_consider_intro: There are multiple reasons why a patient may choose to remove her breast implants:
explantacion_mamaria.reason_1: Changes in aesthetic priorities or lifestyle
explantacion_mamaria.reason_2: Complications such as capsular contracture, rupture, or implant displacement
explantacion_mamaria.reason_3: Symptoms related to ASIA Syndrome or physical discomfort associated with implants
explantacion_mamaria.reason_4: Discomfort or feeling of heaviness in the chest
explantacion_mamaria.reason_5: Desire to recover a more natural body image
explantacion_mamaria.types_title: Types of Explantation performed by Dr. Pérez
explantacion_mamaria.types_intro: Depending on the particular case, Dr. Pérez may opt for different surgical techniques:
explantacion_mamaria.simple_explantation_desc: Removal of breast implants through the same incision where they were placed. It is indicated when there is no capsular contracture or surrounding tissue alterations.
explantacion_mamaria.capsulectomy_title: Explantation with partial or total capsulectomy
explantacion_mamaria.capsulectomy_desc: In patients presenting capsular contracture or other symptoms, the complete or partial removal of the capsule that has formed around the implant is proceeded with, in addition to extracting the prosthesis.
explantacion_mamaria.pexia_desc: When breast tissue has lost firmness or presents significant drooping, a pexy is performed simultaneously to lift and redefine the breast aesthetically and harmoniously.
explantacion_mamaria.technique_point_1: • Each intervention is carefully planned in consultation, taking into account chest anatomy, residual tissue amount, and patient goals.
explantacion_mamaria.technique_point_2: • In cases of capsular contracture or suspected rupture, total en-bloc capsulectomy is performed, removing the implant and capsule in a single piece.
explantacion_mamaria.technique_point_3: • When necessary, natural breast reconstruction techniques using the patient's own breast tissue are combined, achieving a pleasant and proportional shape.
explantacion_mamaria.technique_point_4: • Scars are designed with aesthetic criteria, seeking to be barely visible and easy to conceal.
explantacion_mamaria.meta_title: Breast Explantation in Bogotá | Implant Removal | Dr. Andrés Pérez
explantacion_mamaria.meta_description: Safe surgery for breast implant removal (explantation). Recover your well-being and natural aesthetics with Dr. Andrés Pérez.

q1.question: Anesthesia and duration of the procedure
q1.answer:
Breast explantation is performed under general anesthesia.
The duration of the surgery depends on the type of procedure, ranging from 1.5 to 3 hours.

q2.question: What to expect after surgery?
q2.answer:
• Inflammation and sensitivity: It is normal to experience swelling and a feeling of pressure during the first days.
• Rest and postoperative care: Relative rest and permanent use of the postoperative bra are recommended to support the tissue.
• Surgical drains: In some cases, drains serve for 2 to 5 days to avoid fluid accumulation.
• Disability: Most patients can resume light activities after the 4th or 5th day.
• Final result: The breast shape stabilizes gradually, reaching its definitive appearance between 4 to 6 weeks postsurgery.

q3.question: Will my breasts return to the shape they had before augmentation?
q3.answer: Not exactly. The final shape will depend on natural breast tissue volume, skin elasticity, and the time implants have been worn. Dr. Pérez clearly explains possible results during the consultation.

q4.question: Is a lift always necessary?
q4.answer: No. In some cases, if there is good skin tone and adequate volume, the tissue accommodates naturally without the need for pexy. However, if there is marked drooping, it is recommended to perform the lift in the same surgical act to achieve a more aesthetic result.

q5.question: What happens with the scar?
q5.answer: Scars vary according to the technique used. Dr. Pérez employs closure methods and strategic location so that they are as least visible as possible. With good care, these scars tend to fade over time.

q6.question: Can I get new implants in the future?
q6.answer: Yes. If the patient wishes later on, it is possible to perform an implant replacement, adjusting the technique to the new breast tissue conditions.

liposuccion.title: Liposuction
liposuccion.subtitle: Body Liposculpture
liposuccion.description: Body liposculpture has consolidated itself as one of the most popular and requested surgical procedures worldwide, both in women and men. Throughout life, it is common to develop fat accumulations in different areas of the body, influenced by factors such as:
liposuccion.intro_conclusion: Many patients who consult Dr. Pérez have already tried non-surgical solutions such as diets, exercise, or aesthetic treatments without obtaining a notable improvement in their body contour. This is where liposuction offers a definitive and effective solution.
liposuccion.types_title: Types of Liposuction Used by Dr. Pérez
liposuccion.types_intro: Currently, there are various technologies that facilitate fat extraction and optimize procedure results. The most prominent include:
liposuccion.type_1_desc: It is the most used technique. It consists of infiltrating a solution containing local anesthetic, adrenaline, and saline serum into the target areas. This allows tissues to swell, facilitating fat extraction and minimizing bleeding.
liposuccion.type_2_desc: Uses ultrasound to break down fat and convert it into a liquid state before being extracted. This technology is especially useful for patients who have undergone previous liposuctions and present more fibrous tissues.
liposuccion.type_3_desc: Similar to the VASER technique, but uses laser energy instead of ultrasound to liquefy fat, achieving better results in terms of skin retraction in some areas.
liposuccion.technique_desc: Dr. Andrés Pérez uses advanced liposuction techniques based on personal planning of the patient and their expectations. Among the technical objectives, the following stands out:
liposuccion.technique_point_1: • Effective precision by limiting fat in 3 or more planes, allowing for more precise and harmonic molding.
liposuccion.technique_point_2: • Superior technology and unique maintenance, combining specific characteristics of laser liposuction and ultrasound mixing that allows modifying safety procedures.
liposuccion.technique_point_3: • Careful with the skin, high-precision procedures focused on physical principles necessary for safety to the most effective natural facial contour compared to functional large-scale.
liposuccion.hd_desc_1: This advanced technique seeks to highlight musculature and define specific body areas using the effect of a hybrid liposuction with exercise. Muscle definition is significantly improved, specially in the abdomen.
liposuccion.hd_desc_2: • Dr. Pérez employs this technique in a high percentage of his patients, achieving dynamic, aesthetic, and highly functional results.
liposuccion.meta_title: Liposuction in Bogotá | Liposculpture | Dr. Andrés Pérez
liposuccion.meta_description: Mold your body with Liposuction. Eliminate localized fat and define your silhouette. VASER and Laser techniques available.

q1.question: Anesthesia and duration
q1.answer: Liposuction can be performed under general anesthesia, and its usual duration is 2 to 3 hours, depending on the number of treated areas and if combined with other procedures such as abdominoplasty or fat transfer.

q2.question: What to expect after surgery?
q2.answer: It is important that during the first weeks you maintain healthy physical activities and avoid any type of strenuous exercise. Early inflammation reduction from the first postoperative day is fundamental to obtain better results.

q3.question: Postoperative needs?
q3.answer:
It is important to use simple measures, suggested by Dr. Pérez classified into 3 to 4 combined techniques:
To reduce inflammation. Devices based on individual association. Patients may be recommended during additionally to determine term between which way to follow.
Basically use continuously, to fit, if at least for 6 weeks, to help control inflammation and accelerate the figure and optimize results.

q4.question: Are results maintained over time?
q4.answer:
Yes, as long as the patient maintains a body weight and a healthy routine. Liposuction eliminates correctly like:
• Balanced diet
• Regular physical activity
• Stable weight
Without these habits, it is possible that fat deposit accumulations occur over time.

mamoplastia_reduccion.title: Breast Reduction:
mamoplastia_reduccion.subtitle: Large and sagging breasts: a condition that affects quality of life
mamoplastia_reduccion.description_p1: For many women, having large and sagging breasts (breast ptosis) represents not only an aesthetic concern but also a problem that significantly impacts their quality of life. This condition can make physical activities difficult, limit the use of certain clothing garments, and generate discomfort in daily life.
mamoplastia_reduccion.description_p2: In addition to functional discomfort, excessive bust weight can cause a series of health problems, including:
mamoplastia_reduccion.problem_1: • Chronic back, neck, and head pain.
mamoplastia_reduccion.problem_3: • Skin irritations and infections under the breasts, due to friction and constant moisture.
mamoplastia_reduccion.description_p3: Given this situation, many patients consider medical or surgical procedures that allow them to recover comfort, mobility, and well-being.
mamoplastia_reduccion.technique_intro: There are diverse surgical techniques to perform a breast reduction, and their choice depends on multiple individual factors that Dr. Pérez evaluates carefully in each patient. Among these factors are breast size and shape, skin quality, degree of drooping (ptosis), and patient aesthetic expectations. Generally, these techniques are classified according to the type of incisions used to carry them out.
mamoplastia_reduccion.technique_subtitle: Vertical Technique: the most used by Dr. Pérez
mamoplastia_reduccion.technique_desc: Offers important aesthetic and functional advantages:
mamoplastia_reduccion.vertical_tech_desc: The technique is performed through a vertical incision extending from the bottom of the areola to the submammary fold. This incision is kept as short as possible and usually heals very well over time. Only in cases of extremely large breasts, it may be necessary to add a short horizontal incision in the inframammary groove to achieve a better result.
mamoplastia_reduccion.aesthetic_results_desc: This technique allows remodeling breast tissue achieving a natural, harmonic shape with good projection. Unlike other techniques that may leave a flatter result or without defined contour, the vertical technique favors a firm and youthful result.
mamoplastia_reduccion.candidates_title: Who are candidates for a breast reduction?
mamoplastia_reduccion.candidates_intro_1: Breast reduction is indicated for women who present physical discomfort or aesthetic discomfort due to excessive breast size. This procedure seeks not only to improve bust appearance but also to relieve associated symptoms and improve quality of life.
mamoplastia_reduccion.candidates_intro_2: Ideal candidates are those patients presenting one or more of the following signs or symptoms:
mamoplastia_reduccion.candidate_1: • Large and sagging breasts, disproportionate in relation to the rest of the body.
mamoplastia_reduccion.candidate_2: • Chronic neck, shoulder, or back pain caused by excessive bust weight.
mamoplastia_reduccion.candidate_3: • Frequent headaches associated with muscle tension generated by breast load.
mamoplastia_reduccion.candidate_4: • Limitations to perform physical or sports activity due to discomfort or pain.
mamoplastia_reduccion.candidate_5: • Irritation, rashes, or infections on the skin under the breasts.
mamoplastia_reduccion.candidate_6: • Difficulty finding suitable clothing or bras that provide support and comfort.
mamoplastia_reduccion.meta_title: Breast Reduction in Bogotá | Breast Surgery | Dr. Andrés Pérez
mamoplastia_reduccion.meta_description: Relieve back pain and improve your figure with a breast reduction. Safe and effective procedure. Dr. Andrés Pérez.

q1.question: Anesthesia
q1.answer: Breast reduction is carried out under general anesthesia and the procedure lasts between 2 and 3 hours.

q2.question: What can be expected after surgery?
q2.answer:
• It is normal for moderate inflammation to occur during the first 7 days after the procedure.
• Constant use of a postoperative bra is fundamental, designed to provide support and comfort, favoring adequate recovery.
• It is recommended to avoid sports activities and intense physical efforts for at least the first 10 days, always following personalized medical indications.

q3.question: Can breasts increase in size again?
q3.answer: After a breast reduction, breast size usually remains stable in the long term. However, it is important to keep in mind that factors such as significant weight increases or subsequent pregnancies can modify bust volume and shape.

q4.question: Is nipple sensitivity preserved?
q4.answer: Surgical techniques used by Dr. Pérez are designed to preserve nipple sensitivity. During the procedure, the integrity of nerves responsible for breast sensitivity is respected to the maximum, so the risk of permanent loss is low.

q5.question: Is it possible to breastfeed after a breast reduction?
q5.answer: Yes. In most cases, the ability to breastfeed is preserved, since the techniques employed preserve lactiferous ducts (those carrying milk from the mammary gland to the nipple). However, each case is unique, and will be evaluated individually during the consultation.

pexia.title: Breast Pexy:
pexia.subtitle: Breast Lift and Firming
pexia.description_p1: With the passage of time, factors such as pregnancy, breastfeeding, weight changes, and gravity can cause breasts to lose their firmness and descend. Breast pexy, or breast lift, is the surgical procedure designed to correct this drooping (ptosis), relocating breast tissue to a higher and more aesthetic position.
pexia.description_p2: This procedure not only improves bust height but also allows remodeling its contour and returning a more youthful and firm appearance.
pexia.when_to_consider_title: When to consider a breast pexy?
pexia.when_to_consider_intro: Breast pexy is indicated for women who present:
pexia.candidate_1: Sagging or flaccid breasts, where the nipple is located below the inframammary fold.
pexia.candidate_2: Loss of volume and firmness, giving an appearance of "empty" breasts in the upper part.
pexia.candidate_3: Stretched skin and enlarged areolas due to breast tissue weight.
pexia.candidate_4: Breast asymmetry, where one breast is lower than the other.
pexia.types_intro: Depending on the needs of each patient, Dr. Pérez can perform different types of pexy:
pexia.pexia_with_implants_desc: Ideal for patients who, in addition to lifting the bust, wish to increase its size or recover lost volume.
pexia.pexia_without_implants_desc: Uses the breast tissue itself to remodel and lift the breast, achieving a natural result without the need for prostheses.
pexia.technique_intro: Dr. Pérez employs advanced techniques that minimize scars and ensure lasting results. Incisions are carefully planned according to the degree of drooping:
pexia.technique_point_1: • Periareolar: Around the areola, for mild sagging.
pexia.technique_point_2: • Vertical: Around the areola and vertically downwards, for moderate sagging.
pexia.technique_point_3: • Inverted T: For severe sagging or when significant skin removal is required.
pexia.meta_title: Breast Pexy in Bogotá | Breast Lift | Dr. Andrés Pérez
pexia.meta_description: Recover the firmness and position of your breasts with a Breast Pexy. Safe procedure with or without implants. Dr. Andrés Pérez.

q1.question: Anesthesia
q1.answer: Breast pexy is performed under general anesthesia and lasts approximately 2 to 3 hours.

q2.question: What to expect after surgery?
q2.answer:
• It is normal to experience inflammation and sensitivity during the first days.
• A postoperative bra must be used day and night during the first month.
• Most patients can resume their daily activities (without physical effort) after 5 to 7 days.

q3.question: Are scars visible?
q3.answer: Scars are an inevitable part of surgery, but Dr. Pérez uses intradermal suture techniques so that they are as fine and discreet as possible. Over time, they tend to fade significantly.

q4.question: Does it affect future breastfeeding?
q4.answer: In most cases, the ability to breastfeed is preserved, since lactiferous ducts are preserved. However, this may vary depending on the specific technique used.

acido_hialuronico.title: Hyaluronic Acid
acido_hialuronico.intro_p1: Hyaluronic Acid is one of the most widely used and safest treatments in modern aesthetic medicine. Its ability to
acido_hialuronico.intro_p2: makes it a highly effective tool for restoring facial harmony without surgery.
acido_hialuronico.intro_p3: It is a substance naturally found in the human body, especially in the skin, whose main function is to retain water to keep the skin hydrated, firm, and voluminous. Over time, its production decreases, leading to wrinkles, loss of elasticity, and sagging.
acido_hialuronico.what_is_title: What is Hyaluronic Acid and how does it act?
acido_hialuronico.what_is_desc: The Hyaluronic Acid used in aesthetics is a biocompatible and absorbable form, designed to integrate naturally into tissues without causing adverse reactions.
acido_hialuronico.mechanism_desc: Unlike Botox, which relaxes muscles, Hyaluronic Acid acts as a dermal filler, meaning it fills lines, wrinkles, and furrows through direct injection into the skin. It is also used to restore lost facial volumes or to enhance certain areas such as lips or cheekbones.
acido_hialuronico.types_title: Types of Hyaluronic Acid and their use
acido_hialuronico.types_intro: There are different formulations of Hyaluronic Acid, varying in density and viscosity. This allows Dr. Pérez to select the most suitable type depending on the area to be treated.
acido_hialuronico.type_low_desc: ideal for fine lines and lip contour.
acido_hialuronico.type_medium_desc: used for nasolabial folds, marionette lines, and dark circles.
acido_hialuronico.type_high_desc: to recover volume in cheeks, cheekbones, chin, or jawline.
acido_hialuronico.zones_title: In which zones is it applied?
acido_hialuronico.zones_intro: The most common applications of Hyaluronic Acid include:
acido_hialuronico.technique_intro: Dr. Pérez performs a comprehensive facial evaluation to define the best treatment plan according to each patient's needs. His approach is based on obtaining subtle, harmonious, and natural results, preserving facial expression.
acido_hialuronico.technique_feature_1: Uses top quality and internationally prestigious products
acido_hialuronico.technique_feature_2: Applies topical local anesthesia for greater comfort
acido_hialuronico.technique_feature_3: Uses microcannulas or fine needles, depending on the area to be treated
acido_hialuronico.technique_feature_4: Plans each session individually, focusing on facial symmetry and naturalness
acido_hialuronico.duration_title: How long do the effects last?
acido_hialuronico.duration_intro: The effect of Hyaluronic Acid is temporary but prolonged, and can last between 8 and 18 months, depending on:
acido_hialuronico.duration_factor_4: Habits and lifestyle (sun exposure, smoking, intense exercise)
acido_hialuronico.duration_conclusion: After that period, the product is naturally reabsorbed, and the treatment can be repeated without issues.
acido_hialuronico.side_effects_intro: Side effects are minimal and transient, such as:
acido_hialuronico.side_effect_1: Mild redness or swelling at the application site
acido_hialuronico.side_effect_2: Tenderness or small bruises that disappear in a few days
acido_hialuronico.side_effects_conclusion: In expert hands, Hyaluronic Acid is a highly safe and effective treatment.
